meta.title: Skills Manager · Desktop app for managing multi-Agent Skills
meta.description: Skills Manager — a desktop app for managing, distributing, and restoring skills across nine AI agents: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenClaw, OpenCode, Trae, Qoder, Antigravity, and Kiro.
meta.ogTitle: Skills Manager · Your multi-Agent Skills HQ
meta.ogDescription: Manage local Skills in one place, distribute them across agents, and back them up with GitHub.

hero.rotatingAriaLabel: Skills Manager, Hub, Share, Switch, Sync, Backup, Repo, Download
hero.sub:
Scan local Skills in one place, distribute them across agents, and back them up with GitHub.
Turn scattered skill folders into a reusable, portable library.
hero.previewHint: This sandbox preview shows the real UI and won't read or touch your local Skills.

features.title: One window to manage Skills across every Agent
features.lead: Bring Skills scattered across different agent folders into one place for management, distribution, and backup.

cards.title: One-click share to any Agent
cards.body: Master / sub switches cover both bulk and fine-grained control. Link any Skill to Cursor, Codex or Claude in a single click.

cards.title: GitHub backup & cross-machine sync
cards.body: Push local Skills to GitHub in one click, then pull them back on a new machine. The same repo can serve as both your personal backup and a shared team skill library.

cards.title: Drag-and-drop import · zero config
cards.body: Drop any folder containing a SKILL.md onto the window and it's imported in seconds — no CLI, no path arguments.

cards.title: Flat & by-source dual views
cards.body: Flat view answers "what Skills do I have"; by-source view answers "what's inside each Agent". Switch perspective without losing context.

cards.title: Marketplace · one-click community Skills
cards.body: Browse skills.sh right inside the app — All / Trending / Hot tabs plus keyword search — and clone any community Skill to global or a specific Agent. No more manual git clone.

cards.title: Skill detail · inline preview & delete protection
cards.body: Click any Skill to inspect its full file tree and SKILL.md. Agent folders are read-only by default; flip Advanced Mode for precise, intentional deletes.

ctaBanner.title: Take charge of your Skills today
ctaBanner.body: Free, open-source, cross-platform. Grab the latest installer from GitHub Releases or clone and build it yourself.

items.q: Will it touch my existing local Skills?
items.a: Read-only by default. Symlinks or copies are only created when you opt in — flipping a switch, dragging to import, or clicking "copy to central". Delete and other high-risk operations require Advanced Mode under Settings, so accidental damage is prevented.

Nine today: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenClaw, OpenCode, Trae, Qoder, Antigravity, and Kiro. Any Agent whose Skill folder follows the SKILL.md convention can be scanned and managed — PRs for new Agents are welcome.

items.q: Where do Marketplace Skills come from?
items.a: Data is sourced from skills.sh. Each install is just a local git clone --depth 1 of the corresponding repo, written to either the global library or a specific Agent. No private data ever leaves your machine.

items.q: Is the GitHub backup token safe?
items.a: Your Personal Access Token lives only in the OS keychain / credential manager — never sent to any third-party server. Backup and restore call local git directly, and the repo URL plus public / private choice stay in your control.
Installers ship for macOS (Apple Silicon + Intel) and Windows 10+. Linux users can clone the repo and run pnpm tauri:build to build locally.
